parts: Plagius ageratifolius, also known as the Algerian sage or Spanish sage, has been traditionally used for medicinal purposes. The leaves and flowers of this plant are considered to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. They are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The plant's essential oils, extracted from its leaves and flowers, are also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress. Further research is necessary to confirm the effectiveness and safety of Plagius ageratifolius for medicinal use.
